ul.li: 8-Byte Alignment: Ensures vtable_ptr and child pointers are aligned to word boundaries for efficient CPU fetch.
Cache Line Locality: Concrete nodes are sized to 64 bytes to prevent false sharing and ensure one node fits exactly in a standard L1/L2 cache line.
Visitor Pattern: Implemented via accept(visitor) to decouple tree traversal from semantic operations (e.g., Type Checking vs. IR Generation).
C-Style Struct Packing: Enums and small primitives are packed to minimize padding.
Source Span: The span field maps node back to source buffer for precise syntax error highlighting.
